groups.title: Other Organisations/Services Involved in Care Provision

sections.titleKey: 2. Drug & Alcohol Use and Other Addictions Such as Gambling

groups.title: Do you feel you need support in any of the following areas?

labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.front_matter.cas: Case manager contacted Key workers / Key Agencies
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.accommodation.ha: Have there been any changes to your housing situation since you completed your Initial Assessment?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.accommodation.si: If so, please update the Initial Assessment and describe what changes have occurred
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.accommodation.cu: Describe any needs or concerns you have in relation to current accommodation
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.accommodation.ho: Have you any history of involvement with any homeless services?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.accommodation.ma: Describe any difficulties you may have had in maintaining housing (this can include any history of eviction)
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.accommodation.sl: Describe any history of sleeping rough
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.accommodation.ha: Have you ever had a local authority tenancy?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.accommodation.cu: Do you currently own, or part own, a house or flat?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.accommodation.is: Are you registered for social housing?
Are you currently, or have you previously been, in receipt of HAP or rent supplement?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.accommodation.ha: Have any references been made to other housing providers?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.accommodation.su: Is your current accommodation situation suitable for: Children
Is your current accommodation situation suitable for: Spouse/partner
Is your current accommodation situation suitable for: Care plan
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.accommodation.cr: Does your drug or alcohol use affect your housing situation, or vice versa?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.drug_and_alcohol: Have there been any changes in your drug and/or alcohol use since you completed your Initial Assessment?
Please describe what changes have occurred since the Initial Assessment
What are your needs in relation to your drug or alcohol use?
Have there been any changes to any other addiction (e.g. gambling) since you completed your Initial Assessment?
What services are currently or most recently involved in your drug or alcohol (or other addiction) use?
Have there been any changes to your physical health since you completed your Initial Assessment?
If so, please update the Initial Assessment and describe what changes have occurred
Have you any physical health diagnosis or disability? Please describe
Would you see a need for making medical appointments?
Have there been any changes to your sexual wellbeing since you completed your Initial Assessment?
If so, please update the Initial Assessment and describe what changes have occurred
If you drink or use drugs, does it affect your physical health, or vice versa?
Does your housing situation affect your physical health, or vice versa?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.mental_health.ha: Have there been any changes to your mental health since you completed your Initial Assessment?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.mental_health.me: If so, please update the Initial Assessment and describe what changes have occurred
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.mental_health.ha: Have you any concerns regarding your mental health?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.mental_health.tr: Describe the treatment you are receiving for this diagnosis or condition
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.mental_health.ha: Have you got a mental health diagnosis or condition?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.mental_health.se: Would you see the need for discussing with your GP about making an appointment?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.mental_health.cr: If you drink or use drugs, does it affect your mental health, or vice versa?
Does your housing situation affect your mental health, or vice versa?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.family_and_relat: Have there been any changes to your family/relationships circumstances since you completed your Initial Assessment?
If so, please describe what changes have occurred
Who did you grow up with in your family?
Currently, who are the supportive people in your life?
Is there a friend or family member you would like to be involved in your care plan? Details
Are there any relationships which pose a risk to you or others or your care plan?
Have you any concerns with regards to your significant relationship? (e.g. domestic violence, substance use, criminal activity etc.)
Would you see a need for attending a support service for your relationships?
If you drink or use drugs, does it affect your relationships or family, or vice versa?
Does your housing situation affect your relationships or family, or vice versa?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.child_welfare.ha: Has there been any significant change in relation to your children since you completed your Initial Assessment?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.child_welfare.si: If so, please update the Initial Assessment and describe what changes have occurred
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.child_welfare.re: Are there any relationships which pose a risk to your children (including current partner)?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.child_welfare.be: Are there any behaviours which pose a risk to your children?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.child_welfare.se: Would you see the need for availing of family support?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.child_welfare.cr: If you drink or use drugs, does it affect your children, or vice versa?
Does your housing situation affect your children, or vice versa?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.legal_and_offend: Have there been any changes to your legal/offending behaviour issues since you completed your Initial Assessment?
If so, please update the Initial Assessment and describe what changes have occurred
Do you have current (or suspected) outstanding charges?
Do you have current (or suspected) arrest warrants?
Do you have upcoming court dates?
What is your most serious charge to date?
Have you spent time in prison?
Have you any history of sexual assault, arson, firearms or other weapons charges?
If you drink or use drugs, does it affect your legal situation/offending behaviour, or vice versa?
Does your housing situation affect your legal situation/offending behaviour, or vice versa?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.financial_issues: Do you have any current financial needs, or financial concerns or stressors?
Do you have any current debts?
Are you in receipt of social welfare payment?
Do you have any problems claiming?
If you drink or use drugs, does it affect your finances, or vice versa?
Does your housing situation affect your finances, or vice versa?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.hobbies_interest: What non-substance using hobbies/interests do you have?
What hobbies/interests did you have in the past?
Would you like to develop a new hobby/interest/social support?
What non-substance using activities/social supports are there available to you that you know of?
Do you attend any fellowship (AA, NA etc.) or Faith/Church-based support? Would you like to?
If you drink or use drugs, does it affect your hobbies/interests, or vice versa?
Does your housing situation affect your hobbies/interests, or vice versa?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.education_traini: Have there been any changes in your care manager/your education, training and/or employment situation since you completed your Initial Assessment?
If so, please update and describe what changes have occurred
Have you completed any educational or training courses?
Have you any learning difficulties, including reading and writing?
Would you like to do more education or training?
If you are unemployed, have you ever been in paid employment?
Are you interested in getting a job?
If so, what kind of job?
If you drink or use drugs, does it affect your training or employment, or vice versa?
Does your housing situation affect your training or employment, or vice versa?
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.other_residentia: If yes, or you have been in any of these outside Ireland, please give details
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.independent_livi: Attending a course or job 9-5, Monday to Friday
Finding out about and using local services
Dealing with landlord or housing authorities
Dealing with basic maintenance e.g. changing light bulbs, fuses etc.
Commitments i.e. seeing things through to the end
labelKeys.hse_extended_assessment.assessment_of_pr: What are your care plan priorities over the next three months?
Have you any other relevant information that you would like to add?
